questions.assertion: Assertion (A): Boron and aluminium are present in group 13 of the periodic table.
questions.reason: Reason (R): Boron and aluminium exhibit some properties of p-block elements.
opts: (A) Both A and R are true and R is the correct explanation of A
(B) Both A and R are true but R is not the correct explanation of A
(C) A is true but R is false
(D) A is false but R is true
questions.explanation: Boron and aluminium are indeed present in group 13, and they exhibit some properties of p-block elements, such as an increase in atomic size and a decrease in ionization energy down the group.

questions.assertion: Assertion (A): Phosphorus does not exhibit allotropy.

(C) A is true but R is false
(D) A is false but R is true
questions.explanation: Phosphorus is indeed a metalloid and does not exhibit allotropy, which is a characteristic of metals.
